subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned to the Countenance, and We send down unto him that whereby his name shall endure throughout the dominion and the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الوجه و ننزل له ما یبقی به اسمه بدوام الملک و الملکوت ان
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
